title: Michel Langeveld
text: Home * People * Michel Langeveld Michel Langeveld operating Crafty [1] Michel Langeveld , a Dutch chess player [2] and computer chess programmer. He is author of the chess program Nullmover , and in 2004 modified TSCP to play Gothic Chess , dubbed TSCP Gothic [3] to play the 2004 Gothic Chess Computer World Championship [4] . At the WMCCC 2001 Michel Langeveld served as opening book author and operator of Crafty .
